rulings.Case Title: TRACEY THOMPSON VS. JOHN STEWART CO. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Defendants Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 26, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Motion To Compel Responses To Defendants Form Interrogatories And Request For Monetary Sanctions Transferred to department 301 to be heard at 9:00 a.m. on August 7, 2017. rulings.Case Title: KUMIKO FURUKAWA ET AL VS. NOAH SPURRIER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 26, 2017 line 4. PLAINTIFFs KUMIKO FURUKAWA and THOMAS IANNUZZI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED. rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. ANTHONY BREAUX ET AL
